warnings: Severity ranking is computed only when the recurring_failure_cluster reaches the minimum case threshold.
Below threshold, severity remains unknown; MET never escalates severity from insufficient cases.
failure_prevented: Recurring-failure severity being inflated from a single sample, biasing prioritization toward unverified clusters.
signal_improved: Each cluster's severity_state is paired with comparable_case_count and a next_recommended_input.

severity_signals.next_recommended_input: Add a comparable case before computing severity.
Add two comparable cases before computing severity.
